name: ssh-action
description: Professional GitHub Action for secure SSH config setup and post-job cleanup.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{ recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist-post',{ recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build:cleanup: ncc build src/cleanup.ts -o dist-post && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{ recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('dist-post/index.js','dist/cleanup.js'); fs.rmSync('dist-post',{ recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:cleanup
